videos.title: I genuinely can’t get over this, from reading the book, to seeing the...
videos.description: I genuinely can’t get over this, from reading the book, to seeing the film, I’ve just absolutely adored this story and getting to meet the actual Rocky puppet that they used in the film was a bit surreal.  This wasn’t CGI or anything like that, it was the physical puppet, with 4 or 5 people moving him around on a rig and I got to meet the voice actor for Rocky in the film!  As a fan of movies is so crazy to be involved in something like this, the detail on him was insane, you can tell a lot of love and care went into this.  Thank you so so so much to the team at @Sony Pictures UK and @Project Hail Mary for inviting me to be a part of this and getting to meet Rocky!!!!  #movie #projecthailmary

videos.title: We’re taking on the Three Peaks Challenge to raise money and awarenes...
videos.description: We’re taking on the Three Peaks Challenge to raise money and awareness for mental health! 🏔️ My friend Liam and I are going to hike up the highest peaks in Scotland, England, and Wales in 24 hours – all while raising funds for Mind, a charity that supports those facing mental health challenges. After raising over £3,000 for Mind in 2023 through a 12-hour live stream, we wanted to take things even further. This challenge will push us to our limits, but with your support, we know we can do it. 💪 Huge thanks to Advocate Events  for guiding us and ensuring we stay on track, and if you want to get involved in your own challenges, be sure to check them out! 🙌 Every donation helps us get closer to our £3,000 goal. You can donate through the link in my bio! Thank you for your support💙
